name: Loading Sheet to Dispatch Sheet
qr code batch
FG Store Entry
fg store details is not empty
Delivery note Validation
Update Dnotes Dispatch
Update DNotes
qr code to batch no
script:
name = frappe.form_dict.get("name")

if not name:
    frappe.throw("Missing Stock Entry name")

# Use get_value instead of get_doc
already_created = frappe.db.get_value("Stock Entry", name, "custom_batch_created")

if not already_created:
    item_code = frappe.form_dict.get("item_code")
    qr_codes = frappe.form_dict.get("qr_codes")
    manufacture_date = frappe.form_dict.get("manufacture_date")

    count = frappe.db.count("Batch") + 1
    batch_id = "BATCH-" + frappe.utils.nowdate().replace("-", "") + "-" + str(count).zfill(4)

    batch = frappe.new_doc("Batch")
    batch.item = item_code
    batch.manufacturing_date = manufacture_date
    batch.batch_id = batch_id
    batch.insert()

    for code in qr_codes:
        if frappe.db.exists("Scan Log", code):
            frappe.db.set_value("Scan Log", code, {
                "item_code": item_code,
                "status": "Manufactured",
                "manufacture_date": manufacture_date,
                "batch_no": batch_id
            })
        else:
            log = frappe.new_doc("Scan Log")
            log.name = code
            log.qr_code = code
            log.item_code = item_code
            log.status = "Manufactured"
            log.manufacture_date = manufacture_date
            log.batch_no = batch_id
            log.insert()

    # Update flag to prevent re-creation
    frappe.db.set_value("Stock Entry", name, "custom_batch_created", 1)

    frappe.response['message'] = batch_id
else:
    frappe.response['message'] = "Batch already created. Skipping."

name: Stock Entry Permission
Delivery Note Auto Batch population
script:
for item in doc.items:
    if not item.item_code or not item.warehouse:
        continue

    has_batch = frappe.db.get_value("Item", item.item_code, "has_batch_no")
    if not has_batch:
        continue

    # Only apply if batch is not already manually set
    if item.batch_no:
        continue

    remaining_qty = item.qty
    assigned_batches = []

    # Get available batches for the item, ordered FIFO
    batches = frappe.get_all("Batch",
        filters={"item": item.item_code},
        fields=["name"],
        order_by="creation asc"
    )

    for batch in batches:
        qty_data = frappe.db.sql("""
            SELECT SUM(actual_qty)
            FROM `tabStock Ledger Entry`
            WHERE batch_no = %s
              AND item_code = %s
              AND warehouse = %s
        """, (batch.name, item.item_code, item.warehouse))

        available_qty = qty_data[0][0] if qty_data and qty_data[0][0] else 0

        if available_qty <= 0:
            continue

        if available_qty >= remaining_qty:
            assigned_batches.append({
                "batch_no": batch.name,
                "qty": remaining_qty
            })
            remaining_qty = 0
            break
        else:
            assigned_batches.append({
                "batch_no": batch.name,
                "qty": available_qty
            })
            remaining_qty -= available_qty

    # Handle the assignment
    if assigned_batches and len(assigned_batches) == 1:
        # One batch is enough
        item.batch_no = assigned_batches[0]["batch_no"]

    elif assigned_batches and remaining_qty == 0:
        # Split across multiple batches
        first = assigned_batches[0]
        item.batch_no = first["batch_no"]
        item.qty = first["qty"]

        for batch_info in assigned_batches[1:]:
            doc.append("items", {
                "item_code": item.item_code,
                "qty": batch_info["qty"],
                "batch_no": batch_info["batch_no"],
                "warehouse": item.warehouse,
                "uom": item.uom,
                "conversion_factor": item.conversion_factor or 1,
                "stock_uom": item.stock_uom,
                "rate": item.rate,
                "amount": batch_info["qty"] * (item.rate or 0),
                "description": item.description,
                "item_name": item.item_name
            })

name: loading sheet to dispatch
script:
loading_sheets = json.loads(frappe.form_dict.loading_sheets)

doc = frappe.new_doc("Dispatch Sheet")

doc.date = frappe.utils.nowdate()

for sheet_name in loading_sheets:
    date = frappe.db.get_value("Loading Sheet", sheet_name, "date")
    doc.append("loading_sheets", {
        "loading_sheet": sheet_name,
        "date": date
    })

doc.insert()
frappe.response["message"] = doc.name
